articles.title: Explained: Why gold prices remain subdued despite West Asia tensions

While the near-term outlook is choppy, long-term prospects remain constructive due to persistent geopolitical risks and inflation concerns.

topStories.title: Explained: Why gold prices remain subdued despite West Asia tensions
topStories.description: Gold prices have unexpectedly fallen despite escalating geopolitical tensions, a departure from their safe-haven status. A strong U.S. dollar, rising Treasury yields, and profit-taking after a prior rally are suppressing bullion. While the near-term outlook is choppy, long-term prospects remain constructive due to persistent geopolitical risks and inflation concerns.

dailyNews.title: Kansas man charged in unprovoked park stabbing that left woman critically injured
dailyNews.description: A Kansas man faces attempted murder charges after allegedly stabbing a woman in what police called an unprovoked park attack in Olathe, Kansas.

dailyNews.title: Transgender golfer sues LPGA over policy that protects women's competitions
dailyNews.description: Transgender golfer Hailey Davidson has sued the LPGA, alleging its policy barring biological males who underwent male puberty from women's golf effectively bans all transgender women.

dailyNews.title: Live possum discovered hiding among plush toys in an Australian airport gift shop
dailyNews.description: A wild possum found a clever hiding spot among plush toys in an airport gift shop in Australia and was safely removed, staff confirmed.

dailyNews.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' star Nicholas Brendon dead at 54
dailyNews.description: Nicholas Brendon, who played Xander Harris on "Buffy the Vampire Slayer," died March 20 at age 54. His family says he died in his sleep of natural causes.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' argues whether Iran campaign is historic blunder like Iraq or will keep future Americans safe
dailyNews.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen argued on "The View" that Trump's Iran military operation will keep future Americans safe from a nuclear threat, but co-hosts pushed back.

dailyNews.title: Boxer Tyson Fury's dad, John Fury, reveals their relationship 'is destroyed'
dailyNews.description: John Fury said his relationship with his son, boxer Tyson Fury, was “destroyed," citing decisions on Oleksandr Usyk fights. He also criticized trainer SugarHill Steward.

dailyNews.title: Pilot claims Google Earth image may show Amelia Earhart's missing plane on Pacific island reef
dailyNews.description: A pilot says Google Earth satellite images of Nikumaroro Island may show Amelia Earhart's Lockheed Electra, missing since her 1937 around-the-world flight.

dailyNews.title: Federal judge rules Pentagon policy restricting press access unconstitutional, hands victory to New York Times
dailyNews.description: The New York Times is touting a victory after a federal judge ruled in its favor in a lawsuit against the Pentagon claiming its press policy violated the First and Fifth Amendments.

dailyNews.title: Joseph Duggar searched with hands against wall in booking video after child molestation arrest
dailyNews.description: Joseph Duggar's booking video is released after the former "19 Kids and Counting" star waived extradition. He faces child molestation charges in Florida.

dailyNews.title: California man paroled under ‘youthful offender’ provision for 2 murders kills again less than a year later
dailyNews.description: Darryl Lamar Collins, released early under a youthful offender law, was sentenced to life in prison for the brutal 2021 murder of Fatima Johnson, a mother of six.

topStories.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

dailyNews.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Breaking down how U.S. could undermine its own victory against Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is vowing to continue hitting Iran "very hard," even as he said the country's military is "finished." Mark Montgomery, senior fellow at the Foundation for Defense of Democracies, has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, "will have to be guarded and policed, as necessary, by other Nations who use it."

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: President Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

dailyNews.title: Father of service member killed in Iran war said he never told Pete Hegseth to 'finish' the job
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and President Donald Trump have said the families of service members who died in the Iran war told them to finish the job.

dailyNews.title: White House expands TrumpRx with three new drugs
dailyNews.description: The White House said Friday it’s adding three drugs for diabetes and lung disease to the self-pay platform TrumpRx, as the administration works to expand the site as part of its push to lower drug prices

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options for deploying possibly thousands of ground troops in Iran
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
